filesystem.description: Enhanced file operations for batch processing, directory traversal, and file watching. Scoped to the v2 repository.

git.description: Advanced git operations: branch management, commit history analysis, diff viewing. NEVER auto-commit.

sequential-thinking.description: Extended reasoning for complex algorithm design, pedagogical strategy planning, thesis argumentation.

setup_instructions: 1. Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org/ (LTS version recommended)
2. MCP servers will auto-install on first use via npx
3. Verify in Claude Code settings > MCP Servers section
4. To disable a server, set 'disabled': true in its config
- Git MCP: NEVER use auto-commit features. User always commits manually.
- Filesystem MCP: Scoped to the v2 repository directory only.
- Sequential-thinking MCP: Use for complex planning and thesis argumentation.
changes_from_v1: Paths re-pointed to the v2 repository.

Dropped 'puppeteer' MCP server — it was used in v1 for browser-testing the built Sphinx HTML; v2 uses Astro's dev server (npm run dev) for interactive checks. Add it back later if browser-automation testing becomes useful.

troubleshooting.server_not_found: Ensure Node.js is installed and in PATH.
troubleshooting.permission_errors: Check repository path in config is absolute and correct.
troubleshooting.server_crashes: Check Claude Code logs, verify Node.js version compatibility.

project_specific_notes.filesystem: Use for batch operations across lessons (e.g. scanning public/lessons/, src/content/lessons/), searching curriculum data (src/data/*.ts).
project_specific_notes.git: Analyze commit history for thesis documentation; check when individual lessons shipped.
project_specific_notes.sequential-thinking: Use when planning lesson architecture or solving complex pedagogical challenges.
